subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been received. Thou didst write of the Nineteen Day festivity, and this rejoiced my heart.
subcodes.first_line_orig: نامه ات رسید و از میهمانی هر نوزده روز مرقوم نموده بودی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts, @the power of words; of speech, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @Nineteen-Day Feast, @The Holy Spirit, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
full_text_parts: Thy letter hath been received. Thou didst write of the Nineteen Day festivity, and this rejoiced my heart. These gatherings cause the divine table to descend from heaven, and draw down the confirmations of the All-Merciful. My hope is that the breathings of the Holy Spirit will be wafted over them, and that each one present shall, in great assemblies, with an eloquent tongue and a heart flooded with the love of God, set himself to acclaiming the rise of the Sun of Truth, the dawn of the Daystar that lighteth all the world.
